mapper.select: select tjdate, areaflag, codecname, ifnull(bal_lj, 0) as bal_lj, sumestipaid / 10000.0 as sumestipaid, ifnull(ja_lj, 0) as ja_lj, sumpaid_lj / 10000.0 as sumpaid_lj, ifnull(bal_dr, '0') as bal_dr, ifnull(sumestipaid_dr, '0') as sumestipaid_dr from acd_shuiyanche_cld_hz where areaflag = #{areaflag} and codecname = #{codecname} and tjdate = (select max(tjdate) from acd_shuiyanche_cld_hz)

select tjdate, areaflag, codecname, ifnull(bal_lj, 0) as bal_lj, sumestipaid / 10000.0 as sumestipaid, ifnull(ja_lj, 0) as ja_lj, sumpaid_lj / 10000.0 as sumpaid_lj, ifnull(bal_dr, '0') as bal_dr, ifnull(sumestipaid_dr, '0') as sumestipaid_dr from acd_shuiyanche_cld_hz where tjdate = (select max(tjdate) from acd_shuiyanche_cld_hz) order by areaflag, codecname
